category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Uzbekistan.

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (UzACI / UzStandard)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵（UzACI / UzStandard）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入烏茲別克斯坦：合規差距矩陣（UzACI / UzStandard）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Uzbekistan requirements under UzACI (Agency for Communications and Information, under the Ministry of Digital Technologies) and UzStandard (Uzbekistan Agency for Technical Regulation), covering radio type approval, EMC, electrical safety, importer obligations, labelling, and cybersecurity status. Uzbekistan is not a member of the EAC (Eurasian Economic Union); Russian EAC marks are not valid. CCC is not recognised.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与乌兹别克斯坦UzACI（信息通信局，隶属数字技术部）及UzStandard（技术法规局）要求的差距对照，涵盖无线电型号核准、电磁兼容、电气安全、进口商义务、标签及网络安全现状。乌兹别克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAC）成员，俄罗斯EAC标志在乌无效，CCC认证不被认可。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與烏茲別克斯坦UzACI（信息通訊局，隸屬數字技術部）及UzStandard（技術法規局）要求的差距對照，涵蓋無線電型號核准、電磁相容、電氣安全、進口商義務、標籤及網路安全現狀。烏茲別克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAC）成員，俄羅斯EAC標誌在烏無效，CCC認證不被認可。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Uzbekistan's regulatory framework for wireless devices continues to evolve as the country transitions from GOST-based standards toward IEC/ITU alignment. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current UzACI and UzStandard requirements, labelling obligations, and import procedures with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant Uzbekistan authorities before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。乌兹别克斯坦无线设备监管框架随该国从GOST标准向IEC/ITU标准过渡仍在持续演变。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在出货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士及乌兹别克斯坦相关主管机构核验现行UzACI和UzStandard要求、标签义务及进口程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。烏茲別克斯坦無線設備監管框架隨該國從GOST標準向IEC/ITU標準過渡仍在持續演變。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在出貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士及烏茲別克斯坦相關主管機構核驗現行UzACI和UzStandard要求、標籤義務及進口程序。

answer_first.en: UzACI conformity certificate (type approval) is the primary mandatory requirement for all radio and telecom terminal equipment entering Uzbekistan. Electrical safety follows O'z DSt standards aligned with IEC (220 V / 50 Hz; plug type C/F). EMC requirements apply under O'z DSt / GOST-derived standards. A local authorised importer is required and product labelling must include Uzbek and Russian text. Uzbekistan is NOT in the EAC — the Russian EAC mark carries no legal effect. China CCC and SRRC approvals are not recognised; separate UzACI filing is mandatory.
answer_first.zh: UzACI合格证书（型号核准）是进入乌兹别克斯坦所有无线及电信终端设备的主要强制性要求。电气安全遵循与IEC对齐的O'z DSt标准（220V / 50Hz；C/F型插头）。电磁兼容要求依O'z DSt/GOST衍生标准执行。须指定当地授权进口商，产品标签须包含乌兹别克语和俄语文字。乌兹别克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAC）成员，俄罗斯EAC标志不具法律效力；中国CCC和SRRC核准不被认可，须另行提交UzACI申请。
answer_first.zht: UzACI合格證書（型號核准）是進入烏茲別克斯坦所有無線及電信終端設備的主要強制性要求。電氣安全遵循與IEC對齊的O'z DSt標準（220V / 50Hz；C/F型插頭）。電磁相容要求依O'z DSt/GOST衍生標準執行。須指定當地授權進口商，產品標籤須包含烏茲別克語和俄語文字。烏茲別克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAC）成員，俄羅斯EAC標誌不具法律效力；中國CCC和SRRC核准不被認可，須另行提交UzACI申請。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
